open_workbook.name: Open Workbook
open_workbook.description: Open an existing Excel workbook file

read_only.label: Read Only
read_only.description: Open the workbook in read-only mode

create_workbook.name: Create Workbook
create_workbook.description: Create a new empty Excel workbook

close_workbook.name: Close Workbook
close_workbook.description: Close the current workbook, optionally saving changes

save_workbook.name: Save Workbook
save_workbook.description: Save the workbook to a file

path.label: Path
path.description: Path to save the file (optional if already opened)

get_sheet_names.name: Get Sheet Names
get_sheet_names.description: Get list of all sheet names in the workbook

get_active_sheet.name: Get Active Sheet
get_active_sheet.description: Get the name of the currently active sheet

set_active_sheet.name: Set Active Sheet
set_active_sheet.description: Set the active sheet by name

sheet.label: Sheet
sheet.description: Name of the sheet to activate

create_sheet.name: Create Sheet
create_sheet.description: Create a new sheet in the workbook

delete_sheet.name: Delete Sheet
delete_sheet.description: Delete a sheet from the workbook

name.label: Name
name.description: Name of the sheet to delete

read_cell.name: Read Cell
read_cell.description: Read the value from a specific cell

sheet.label: Sheet
sheet.description: Sheet name (active sheet if not specified)

write_cell.name: Write Cell
write_cell.description: Write a value to a specific cell

sheet.description: Sheet name (active sheet if not specified)

read_range.description: Read a range of cells, optionally as dictionary rows

start_cell.description: Starting cell of the range (e.g., A1)

end_cell.label: End Cell
end_cell.description: Ending cell of the range (e.g., Z100)

sheet.description: Sheet name (active sheet if not specified)

as_dict.label: As Dictionary
as_dict.description: Return data as a list of dictionaries with headers

write_range.name: Write Range
write_range.description: Write a 2D array of data starting at a cell

sheet.label: Sheet
sheet.description: Sheet name (active sheet if not specified)

find_row.description: Find a row by searching for a value in a column

sheet.description: Sheet name (active sheet if not specified)

get_row_count.description: Get the number of rows in a sheet

get_column_count.description: Get the number of columns in a sheet

sheet.label: Sheet

read_sheet_to_list.description: Read an entire sheet into a list of dictionaries using headers
